rejects.reason: No current DailyMed SPL exists for Paula's Choice RESIST Youth-Extending Daily Hydrating Fluid SPF 50 (drug_name searches 'youth extending', 'daily hydrating fluid', 'hydrating fluid spf 50', 'youth-extending' and labeler search "Paula's Choice" return no matching label), so broad_spectrum/spf/label_source cannot be verified from a regulatory label. Additionally the manufacturer page (https://www.paulaschoice.com/resist-youth-extending-daily-hydrating-fluid-spf-50/780.html, fetched 2026-07-16, product/name/size match) makes no non-comedogenic / won't-clog-pores claim (only a customer testimonial), so noncomedogenic_claim_not_verified cannot be cleared.

Manufacturer page unavailable: supergoop.com PDP returns 404 on all known slugs (products/daily-dose-vitamin-c-spf-40, products/daily-dose-vitamin-c-serum-spf-40, products/daily-dose-vitamin-c-serum-spf-40-pbase, pages/daily-dose-vitamin-c; fetched 2026-07-16) and supergoop.com search suggest returns zero products for 'daily dose vitamin c' while returning results for other products, indicating Daily Dose Vitamin C + SPF 40 Sunscreen Serum has been removed from the manufacturer's catalog (discontinued). Page-sourced facts (routine role, cadence, noncomedogenic claim) cannot be verified.

Exact catalog product no longer sold by manufacturer: coola.com URL for Full Spectrum 360° Sun Silk Drops Organic Sunscreen SPF 30 returns 404, and the current coola.com product at products/face-spf-30-sun-silk-organic-sunscreen-drops is the renamed/reformulated 'Anti-Aging Sun Silk Drops' (SKU CL10479; no 'Full Spectrum 360°'/'Organic' branding anywhere on page; new 2025 DailyMed SPL bbb29d0c-ae1f-409e-8fd6-ff3ea34dc9c2 lists actives avobenzone/octisalate/octocrylene vs the old Full Spectrum 360 label 9a03c1f7-098e-035d-e053-2a95a90a1fef with avobenzone/homosalate/octisalate/octocrylene). Additionally neither the current page nor either SPL makes a non-comedogenic claim.
